mapper.select: SELECT p.parent_id, p.email, p.password_hash, p.name, p.created_at FROM AUTH_LOGIN_TOKEN t JOIN PARENT p ON p.parent_id = t.parent_id WHERE t.token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND t.subject_type = 'parent' AND t.expires_at > SYSTIMESTAMP

SELECT c.child_id, c.parent_id, c.invite_id, c.frame_id, c.nickname, c.character_image_url, c.character_level, c.created_at, i.invite_code, f.frame_type FROM AUTH_LOGIN_TOKEN t JOIN CHILD c ON c.child_id = t.child_id JOIN CHILD_INVITE i ON i.invite_id = c.invite_id JOIN FRAME f ON f.frame_id = c.frame_id WHERE t.token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND t.subject_type = 'child' AND t.expires_at > SYSTIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE AUTH_LOGIN_TOKEN SET last_used_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND expires_at > SYSTIMESTAMP
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM AUTH_LOGIN_TOKEN WHERE expires_at <= SYSTIMESTAMP
